metadata.name: Synthetic Fraud/Cyber Graph Dataset
metadata.note: Synthetic data for graph database testing. No real persons, accounts, devices, or IP intelligence.

attack_patterns.name: account-takeover
attack_patterns.description: Account takeover using a new device, anomalous IP, credential reset, and high-value payment

attack_patterns.name: synthetic-identity
attack_patterns.description: Synthetic identity behavior involving new accounts, shared devices, and rapid value movement

attack_patterns.name: mule-ring
attack_patterns.description: Money mule ring pattern with many incoming payments followed by rapid outbound transfers

attack_patterns.name: card-testing
attack_patterns.description: Low-value authorization probes followed by higher-value attempted transaction

attack_patterns.name: credential-stuffing
attack_patterns.description: Multiple failed logins across accounts from shared infrastructure followed by successful payment
